rationale: Review 1's sole finding identifies a real, localized naming mismatch (`mem_sup_adjoin_sq_of_exists` at Quadratic.lean:29 has `_sq` despite lacking any `hx2` hypothesis, unlike its two sibling theorems that do); fixing it improves internal consistency with no downside. Review 2's findings are either off-rubric (tautological lemmas, minor private helper) or contested opinion (the `squareClass_of_*` names align with the file's documented theme and Mathlib IsSquare style, so renaming would not clearly improve the merged PR).
